brand.name: Vertiv BOM Grid
brand.description: A high-precision Bill of Materials management tool for engineering change order tracking. Aesthetics inspired by industrial architecture and precision instrumentation.

fonts.usage: Data tables, Part Numbers, Technical Specs

scale.caption: text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider font-sans

primary.name: Industrial Orange
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Active States, Critical Alerts, Progress Bars

rules: Use high opacity (80%+) for legibility over data.
Always include a 1px border (border-slate-200/60) to define edges.
Never use glass backgrounds for the main data grid content (only headers and overlays).

layout.bom_grid: Full-width data table with sticky headers and collapsible sidebar
layout.spacing: Dense but breathable. Use p-4 for standard containers, p-6 for dashboards.

visual_enhancers.texture: Subtle noise on sidebar backgrounds to reduce sterility.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid slate-200 for structure. No soft shadows for data rows.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for floating drawers.

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white rounded-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-wide px-6 py-2 shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-sm font-medium px-4 py-2

cards.kpi: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-5 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-orange-200 transition-colors
cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm shadow-sm h-full

grid.header: bg-slate-50/90 backdrop-blur-sm border-b border-slate-200 text-slate-500 font-bold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider h-10 px-4 text-left sticky top-0 z-10
grid.row: border-b border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50/50 transition-colors h-12 text-sm text-slate-700 group

status_badge.base: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium border

images.description: Abstract industrial orange concrete structure for project dashboard headers.

universal_guidelines: Always use 'Barlow Condensed' for headings and KPIs.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all Part Numbers, IDs, and tabular numeric data.
Primary Action Color is Orange-500. Do not use it for backgrounds, only interactions.
Glassmorphism is for 'floating' elements (Sticky Headers, Drawers, Modals, Toasts). Base layers should be solid.
Data Density is priority: Use compact padding (py-2) in grid rows.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use gradients for main backgrounds. Use solid whites or very light grays.
Role-based views should act as 'filters' for column visibility.
Industrial Theme means: Sharp corners (rounded-sm), high contrast borders, and monospaced data.
